series_metadata.series_description: Original computer printout, instructions and work sheets used to complete equipment inventory reports.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 2 years, then destroy, provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released. ; Paper: Retain for 2 years, then destroy, provided audited by Auditor of State and audit report is released., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper
